title: No internet connection with Windows and Podman 5.4.0-rc3
body:
### Issue Description

If using the pre-release candidate 5.4.0-rc3 neither the podman default machine or a container has internet access with Windows.
I have to enable the user-mode networking that i get internet access.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Using Podman 5.4.0-rc3
2. podman machine init
3. podman machine start
=> no internet access

1. podman machine set --user-mode-networking
=> Internet access

### Describe the results you received

No internet access for machine or a container

### Describe the results you expected

Internet access without using user-mode networking

### podman info output

```yaml
Podman 5.4.0-rc3
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

WSL-Version: 2.4.10.0
Kernelversion: 5.15.167.4-1
WSLg-Version: 1.0.65
MSRDC-Version: 1.2.5716
Direct3D-Version: 1.611.1-81528511
DXCore-Version: 10.0.26100.1-240331-1435.ge-release
Windows-Version: 10.0.22631.4751

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: I'm not able to reproduce this with a fresh install and rc3.

@maxirass, what does "=> no internet access" mean for you? Can you provide more details, like the command that is failing and the output that you are observing, for example? Also, you are testing a release candidate. Have you tested with a stable version of Podman? Does that change something? Without more details, we won't be able to reproduce and troubleshoot your problem.

Closing as we're unable to reproduce. If this issue still persists, please feel free to re-open with more specific information on how to reproduce, or information on if other versions show this same issue as well.
